title: Verb Phrase Domain Schema
description: Validates the structural properties, argument structures, and morphosyntactic alternations of verbal predicates (VERB, AUX) serving as clausal heads.

pos_payload.title: Verbal Part of Speech Payload
pos_payload.description: Behavioral and morphological payload specific to verbal heads, tracking token class, stem alternation sets, and structural constraints.

token_class.title: Verb Token Subtype
token_class.description: The specific macro-functional category of the verb within clausal architecture.

stem_alternations.title: Verb Stem Alternation Set
stem_alternations.description: Tracks the morphological Stem I and Stem II alternations crucial for clausal aspect, mood, transitivity changes, and subordinate selection.

stem_i.title: Stem I (Baseline / Independent)
stem_i.description: The default underlying verb stem typically utilized in matrix declarative active finite frames.

stem_ii.title: Stem II (Dependent / Alternate)
stem_ii.description: The morphologically altered stem variant triggered by specific syntactically dependent environments (e.g., nominalizations, relative clauses, specific negation or aspectual frames).

surface_forms.title: Orthographic Surface Forms
surface_forms.description: An array containing all verified, explicit surface level orthographic representations mapped directly from this verb lexicon entry.

structural_constraints.title: Syntactic & Morphosyntactic Constraints
structural_constraints.description: Machine-readable declarations controlling how this verb interacts with clitics, aspectual particles, linear word order, or auxiliary chains.

internal_structure.title: Internal Morphological Structure
internal_structure.description: Decomposes the core lemma to verify its underlying derivational status or compounding setup.

root_lemma.title: Root Lemma Base
root_lemma.description: The base historical or un-prefixed predicate lemma from which the surface form is derived.

derivation_type.title: Derivational Category
derivation_type.description: The structural classification describing the morphological composition of the verbal stem.

morphotactics.title: Morphotactic Formula
morphotactics.description: A formalized structural expression displaying the word-formation mechanics (e.g., 'VA- + ROOT' or 'ROOT + -sak').
